payload.content: Write a single SQL query against table `t`. The table has the columns shown in the input header. Do NOT use any table name other than `t`. Do NOT define schemas, views, or CTEs that reference other names.

Example — for the question 'Who scored the most points?' on a table with columns [Position, Driver, Team, Points]:
```sql
SELECT Driver FROM t ORDER BY CAST(Points AS INTEGER) DESC LIMIT 1;
```

payload.name: sql
payload.description: SQL query that answers the question.
